steps.title: Identify the naming task
steps.content: The student wants to specify the fanner basket's name in Choctaw. The relevant note says the fanner basket is called ufko tapushik, so the correct sentence must connect that term to the basket.

steps.title: Separate archive facts from basket facts
steps.content: Several notes describe the Hina Hanta archive, but the task is narrower than identifying the archive or translating its name. A sentence about "bright path" in Choctaw does not name the fanner basket.

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content: Choice A mentions the fanner basket and robe as cultural artifacts but gives no Choctaw name for the basket. Choice C mentions Hina Hanta and a fanner basket but gives only the archive's meaning. Choice D discusses the archive name and does not mention the basket. Choice B directly says the cane fanner basket is called ufko tapushik in Choctaw. The answer is B.
